text: Conference Research Plan

学习 AI 的角色：
人类如何形成稳定的人机协作架构
textPreview: 学习 AI 的角色： | 人类如何形成稳定的人机协作架构

text: 从 trust/adoption 转向 architecture learning
textPreview: 从 trust/adoption 转向 architecture learning

text: AI error 最值得警惕的后果，不是某一次互动中的 trust 下滑，而是它可能通过非对称学习重画权限边界，进而把人机协作系统推向一条长期低 AI 授权的收敛路径。
textPreview: AI error 最值得警惕的后果，不是某一次互动中的 trust 下滑，而是它可能通过非对称学习重画权限边界，进而把人机协作系统推向一条长期低 AI 授权的收敛路径。

text: Real multi-agent redo package | June 2026

开场不要先讲 trust。先讲现实问题已经变了：组织现在决定的是 AI 的角色，而不是要不要碰它。
一句话主张要咬住：AI error 的关键后果不是短期 trust 下降，而是长期授权路径被改写。
如果评委一上来把题目听成 adoption，请立刻把问题重述成 role configuration 与 architecture learning。
WHY NOW
The Problem Has Changed
AI 时代的核心问题已经从“是否采用”变成“如何配置角色”。
textPreview: AI 时代的核心问题已经从“是否采用”变成“如何配置角色”。

text: What the old frame asks

Do people trust AI?
Will users adopt AI?
Will they accept one piece of advice?
Can they calibrate AI confidence?
textPreview: Do people trust AI? | Will users adopt AI? | Will they accept one piece of advice? | Can they calibrate AI confidence?

text: What this project asks
In repeated feedback, where do humans finally place AI in the decision chain?
textPreview: In repeated feedback, where do humans finally place AI in the decision chain?

text: 1  Human-only
2  AI advice + human decision
3  AI recommendation + confirmation
4  AI default + human override
5  AI autonomous decision

这里要明确：AI 不是普通工具，它可以是顾问、推荐者、默认执行者，甚至自主决策者。
因此研究问题不能停留在 use vs. not use，而必须升级成 how to organize human-AI collaboration。
如果听众说这仍然像 adoption，就强调 adoption 只能回答“用不用”，不能回答“放在哪”。
LITERATURE GAP
Why Existing Literatures Are Not Enough
textPreview: Why Existing Literatures Are Not Enough

text: 它们解释短期反应很多，但解释长期协作结构形成很少。
textPreview: 它们解释短期反应很多，但解释长期协作结构形成很少。

text: Trust
Explains whether an output is worth believing.
textPreview: Explains whether an output is worth believing.

text: Advice-taking
Explains whether one recommendation is accepted.
textPreview: Explains whether one recommendation is accepted.

text: Calibration
Explains whether users understand confidence signals.
textPreview: Explains whether users understand confidence signals.

text: Aversion
Explains whether algorithm errors trigger immediate punishment.
textPreview: Explains whether algorithm errors trigger immediate punishment.

text: Missing piece: long-run architecture formation under repeated feedback.
textPreview: Missing piece: long-run architecture formation under repeated feedback.

text:
这页不是贬低旧文献，而是指出它们的分析单位大多是单轮判断或局部反馈。
我们要补的是 architecture-level learning，不是再做一个更复杂的 trust study。
如果被问 novelty 在哪里，答案是：研究对象、时间尺度、学习内容和结果变量都换了。
FRAMING
Theoretical Reframing
这不是换标题，而是同时改写研究对象、时间尺度、学习内容和结果变量。
textPreview: 这不是换标题，而是同时改写研究对象、时间尺度、学习内容和结果变量。

text: Old frame

Object: attitudes toward AI
Time scale: one-shot response
Learning target: AI capability
Outcome: adoption, reliance, trust
textPreview: Object: attitudes toward AI | Time scale: one-shot response | Learning target: AI capability | Outcome: adoption, reliance, trust

text: New frame

Object: collaboration architecture
Time scale: long-run convergence
Learning target: AI role in the system
Outcome: autonomy path, boundary, lock-in
textPreview: Object: collaboration architecture | Time scale: long-run convergence | Learning target: AI role in the system | Outcome: autonomy path, ...

text: TO
From trust/adoption -> architecture learning; from short-term error response -> long-run convergence.
textPreview: From trust/adoption -> architecture learning; from short-term error response -> long-run convergence.

text:
这页是 framing 的中轴页。要讲清：不是换个更响亮的词，而是整个问题结构变了。
AgentA 的红线是：如果主因变量能被 trust 量表替代，项目就已经降级。
这里可以主动点出：我们研究的是 role learning，不是 capability learning。
CORE THEORY
Core Theory
反馈更新的是架构吸引力，而不是抽象 trust 分数。
textPreview: 反馈更新的是架构吸引力，而不是抽象 trust 分数。

text: 1  Repeated feedback
2  Architecture attraction updating
3  AI vs. human error asymmetry
4  Path dependence
5  Convergence and steady state
The strongest claim

Humans do not only learn whether AI is reliable; they learn whether AI deserves a particular role.
AI error matters because it can be interpreted as role misfit, not merely answer-level failure.
Early AI error can reduce future exposure to high-autonomy structures and slow recovery.
textPreview: Humans do not only learn whether AI is reliable; they learn whether AI deserves a particular role. | AI error matters because it can be i...

text:
这一页要把机制讲实：错误影响的不只是答案评价，更是角色授权判断。
如果评委问为什么 early error 关键，不要答“首因效应”，要答“它改写了后续暴露与修复机会”。
这里的 steady state 是 EWA 意义上的学习稳定状态，不是传统 Nash equilibrium。
QUESTIONS
Research Questions and Hypotheses
主问题是角色学习，机制问题是非对称更新，结果问题是路径依赖。
textPreview: 主问题是角色学习，机制问题是非对称更新，结果问题是路径依赖。

text: Research questions

Do humans converge toward stable human-AI collaboration architectures under repeated feedback?
When average objective performance is held equal, do AI errors trigger stronger negative architecture updating than human errors?
Do early AI errors create path-dependent convergence toward low-AI-autonomy structures?
Can the resulting steady state deviate from an objective benchmark?
textPreview: Do humans converge toward stable human-AI collaboration architectures under repeated feedback? | When average objective performance is he...

text: Hypotheses

H1: AI errors carry stronger negative weights than human errors.
H2: Early AI error lowers long-run autonomy choice.
H3: Recovery from AI error is weaker than the initial damage.
H4: Human early error does not symmetrically push people toward high AI autonomy.
H5: Participants may settle into suboptimal low-autonomy steady states.
textPreview: H1: AI errors carry stronger negative weights than human errors. | H2: Early AI error lowers long-run autonomy choice. | H3: Recovery fro...

text:
这里要让听众看到：问题不是‘下一轮会不会少用一点 AI’，而是‘长期会收敛到哪里’。
H5 很关键，它把项目从普通 behavior response 拉到 suboptimal institutional outcome。
如果被追问为什么要谈最优，需要说明：没有客观 benchmark，就不能声称观察到了次优锁定。
DESIGN
Experimental Design
多轮行为实验 + 动态学习模型，用架构选择轨迹而不是问卷态度来识别机制。
textPreview: 多轮行为实验 + 动态学习模型，用架构选择轨迹而不是问卷态度来识别机制。

text: paid rounds
architecture choices
experimental conditions
steady-state window
Architecture ladder

Human-only
AI advice + human decision
AI recommendation + human confirmation
AI default + human override
AI autonomous decision
textPreview: Human-only | AI advice + human decision | AI recommendation + human confirmation | AI default + human override | AI autonomous decision

text: Conditions

AI Early Error
AI Late Error
Human Early Error
Evenly Distributed Errors
textPreview: AI Early Error | AI Late Error | Human Early Error | Evenly Distributed Errors

text:
分析单位必须是 repeated architecture choice trajectory，而不是单次 advice acceptance。
多轮设计是红线。如果只做 vignette 或十轮以内，无法研究 convergence 与 steady state。
汇报时要强调：主结果不是 trust，而是 autonomy path、switching rate、recovery speed 和 low-autonomy lock-in。
IDENTIFICATION
What Identifies Path Dependence
同均值，不同路径；同冲击强度，不同来源。
textPreview: 同均值，不同路径；同冲击强度，不同来源。

text: AI Early Error vs. AI Late Error
textPreview: AI Early Error vs. AI Late Error

text:
Same total AI errors
Same long-run AI average accuracy
Same human average accuracy
Same cases and cost rules
Only timing differs
If 61-90 still diverges, sequence changed the path
textPreview: Same total AI errors | Same long-run AI average accuracy | Same human average accuracy | Same cases and cost rules | Only timing differs ...

text: AI Early Error vs. Human Early Error
textPreview: AI Early Error vs. Human Early Error

text:
Same early shock timing
Same shock quantity and severity
Same long-run average performance
Only source differs
If AI shock lowers autonomy more, punishment is source-based
textPreview: Same early shock timing | Same shock quantity and severity | Same long-run average performance | Only source differs | If AI shock lowers...

text: Common recovery window: all shocks end before the final observation window.
textPreview: Common recovery window: all shocks end before the final observation window.

text:
这是方法页的核心。最重要的一句话是：我们操控的是经验路径，不是能力水平。
如果 AI 与 human 长期平均表现不同，后期授权差异就可能只是 rational response，而不是 learning path。
共同恢复窗口是为了排除‘最近冲击更强’而不是路径依赖的解释。
ALTERNATIVE EXPLANATIONS
What This Is Not
要有力声称路径依赖，必须系统排除替代解释。
textPreview: 要有力声称路径依赖，必须系统排除替代解释。

text: Prior anti-AI bias
Measure prior AI attitude and initial architecture preference; estimate initial attraction separately.
textPreview: Measure prior AI attitude and initial architecture preference; estimate initial attraction separately.

text: Generic inertia
Estimate switching cost eta so we can separate ‘too lazy to switch’ from path-dependent updating.
textPreview: Estimate switching cost eta so we can separate ‘too lazy to switch’ from path-dependent updating.

text: Recent shock effect
All shocks end before the common final window; if early shock still matters, it is not just recency.
textPreview: All shocks end before the common final window; if early shock still matters, it is not just recency.

text: Fatigue or task difficulty
Use the same case pool and round controls so differences cannot be explained by some groups simply facing harder tasks.
textPreview: Use the same case pool and round controls so differences cannot be explained by some groups simply facing harder tasks.

text:
这一页对应 AgentB 的‘替代解释排除’和 AgentA 的‘监管红线’。
如果不能把先验偏见、惯性和近期冲击拆开，本研究就会看起来像更复杂的 algorithm aversion。
答辩时可以主动说：我们并不否认这些机制可能存在，但主机制必须是 AI error 改写角色授权路径。
MODEL
EWA Is the Theory Language
如果 EWA 只在最后出现，它就是装饰；只有贯穿理论和设计，它才有意义。
textPreview: 如果 EWA 只在最后出现，它就是装饰；只有贯穿理论和设计，它才有意义。

text:
N(t) = rho * N(t-1) + 1

A(k,t) = prior attraction
          + experienced payoff updating

P(choice k) = f[ attraction,
                  switching cost, sensitivity ]
textPreview: N(t) = rho * N(t-1) + 1 |  | A(k,t) = prior attraction |           + experienced payoff updating |  | P(choice k) = f[ attraction, |     ...

text:
Key interpretation:
AI errors and human errors can carry different updating weights.
Early shocks matter because they change future exposure and future updating opportunities.
textPreview: Key interpretation: | AI errors and human errors can carry different updating weights. | Early shocks matter because they change future e...

text: Parameters that matter

theta_AI^- : negative weight on AI error
theta_H^- : negative weight on human error
eta : generic switching cost
lambda : choice sensitivity
delta : counterfactual learning weight
phi and rho : persistence of prior experience
textPreview: theta_AI^- : negative weight on AI error | theta_H^- : negative weight on human error | eta : generic switching cost | lambda : choice se...

text: Strong empirical signature: theta_AI^- < theta_H^- < 0, and |theta_AI^-| > theta_AI^+.
textPreview: Strong empirical signature: theta_AI^- < theta_H^- < 0, and |theta_AI^-| > theta_AI^+.

text:
这里不要把注意力放在公式本身，而要讲公式在替谁说话：它是在替架构学习这条理论链说话。
最重要的参数解读是：AI error 的负向更新权重是否更大，以及它是否比后续正确更难被修复。
如果评委问为什么不用静态 logit，答案是：静态模型无法识别路径依赖和收敛过程。
CONTRIBUTIONS
Expected Contributions
从态度逻辑推进到结构逻辑，从短期惩罚推进到长期锁定。
textPreview: 从态度逻辑推进到结构逻辑，从短期惩罚推进到长期锁定。

text: Theory

From trust/adoption to architecture learning
From capability learning to role learning
textPreview: From trust/adoption to architecture learning | From capability learning to role learning

text: Mechanism

AI error as boundary-redrawing event
Asymmetric updating -> path dependence
textPreview: AI error as boundary-redrawing event | Asymmetric updating -> path dependence

text: Method

Repeated architecture choice
Same means, different paths
textPreview: Repeated architecture choice | Same means, different paths

text: Governance

From performance audit to architecture audit
From rollout to recovery design
textPreview: From performance audit to architecture audit | From rollout to recovery design

text:
这页要避免变成流水账。最强的总结是：我们把 AI 行为研究从 attitude logic 推进到 structure logic。
如果被问最核心理论贡献，一句话答：AI error 通过非对称架构更新改写长期收敛路径。
如果被问最核心方法贡献，一句话答：用 repeated architecture choice 替代单轮 advice-taking，并在同均值不同路径框架下识别动态机制。
CLOSE
Governance Implication
治理真正要管理的，不只是性能，而是协作架构如何形成、如何锁定、又如何恢复。
textPreview: 治理真正要管理的，不只是性能，而是协作架构如何形成、如何锁定、又如何恢复。

text: 1  Early deployment is institution formation
部署初期不是普通磨合期，而是角色边界开始被学习的阶段。
textPreview: 部署初期不是普通磨合期，而是角色边界开始被学习的阶段。

text: 2  Reversible delegation matters
如果边界一旦下移就很难恢复，治理就必须保留可逆授权与重新暴露机会。
textPreview: 如果边界一旦下移就很难恢复，治理就必须保留可逆授权与重新暴露机会。

text: 3  Audit the path, not only the score
textPreview: 3  Audit the path, not only the score

text: 平均准确率高，不代表组织没有把 AI 学成一个长期低权限角色。
textPreview: 平均准确率高，不代表组织没有把 AI 学成一个长期低权限角色。

text: The real governance question is not only whether AI is strong, but what kind of role the organization will learn to give it.
textPreview: The real governance question is not only whether AI is strong, but what kind of role the organization will learn to give it.

text:
结尾不要只说‘对企业有启发’。要明确说：治理要从 performance audit 扩展到 collaboration architecture audit。
如果机制成立，组织最大的风险不只是误判，而是长期 under-delegation lock-in。
最后一句一定要回到题眼：重要的不只是 AI 有多强，而是组织会把它学成什么角色。
